{{Infobox technique
| name = Fox Mirror technique
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fox Mirror technique]] allows a user to craft illusions as precise as a mirror's reflection.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fox Mirror technique]] allows [[White Fox Forgers]] to create illusionary copies of exact appearance but no real substance.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Fox Mirror technique]] is used by [[Wei clan]] Forgers to create highly detailed illusionary copies.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
